title: RSA Encryption, Signatures, and Safe Migration · Go Scenario Checkpoint
summary: A release board compares near-miss decisions for rsa encryption, signatures, and safe migration and accepts only bounded behavior, causal changed-case evidence, and an explicit native, entropy, interoperability, side-channel, compliance, or production transfer gate. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for RSA-OAEP and RSA-PSS boundary adapter. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Generate or parse supported RSA keys with minimum strength, valid public exponent, purpose, provenance, and bounded encodings.
Use RSA-OAEP only for bounded key material with matching hash and label context and uniform decryption failure.
Hash exact canonical bytes and use RSA-PSS with explicit hash and salt policy for new RSA signatures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Crypto Go Rsa Agility Migration
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz cryptographic engineering team handles case 6437 during a signed release review. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate RSA on trusted keys, OAEP or PSS purpose, payload limits, and uniform failure; preserve accessible status, non-color meaning, keyboard operation, error recovery, and secret-safe diagnostics; then swap the role, tenant, recipient, algorithm, or context and prove domain separation. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Inventory RSA uses, migrate by purpose to modern approved alternatives, retain verified old-read windows, and remove obsolete private keys.

The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?

Evidence target: Cryptography and Go Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Crypto Go Rsa Agility Migration.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for inventory rsa uses, migrate by purpose to modern approved alternatives, retain verified old-read windows, and remove obsolete private keys. For Cryptography and Go Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Crypto Go Rsa Agility Migration, keep Crypto Go Rsa Agility Migration connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
